headline: 4 Stocks in Focus That Announced Dividend Hikes Amid Economic Uncertainties
summary: PAG, PKG, MAR and TKR raised dividends as investors seek steady income amid inflation, tariffs and Iran conflict uncertainty.

headline: Applied Materials To Rally Around 25%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Friday
summary: Analysts change outlook on top Wall Street names. Piper Sandler cuts target for Figma to $30, Roth Capital raises Intuitive Machines target to $50.

headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $402
summary: Bernstein  analyst Richard Clarke   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $400 to $402.
